verses.text: Israel mite aw, Topa' thugen ngai un. Hih gamsungah a teng mite tungah Topa lungkimlo ahih manin hih bangin mawhsak hi: Hih gamsungah cihtakna ahi a, itna ahi zongin omlo a, mite in kei pen Pasian-in hong ngaihsunlo uh hi
Mite in thuciamna bawl napi-in a thuciamte uh palsat uh hi. Zuau genin, mi thatin, guta-in, nulepa mawhna bawl uh hi. A sia khat khit a sia khat a banbanin gamta-in a mawhna uh behlaplap uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin leitang keugaw-in a tunga teng khempeuh si ding a, leitunga om gamsa khempeuh leh huihlaka leeng vasa khempeuh tawh si mang ding uh a, tuipi sunga om ngasate nangawn si mang ding hi
Kuamah in mihonte mawhsak kei hen la, mihonte taai kei hen. Kei' lungkimlohna no siampite' tung ahi hi
A sun a zan cih omloin na nasepnate uh a kiman'na mel omlo hi; kamsangte zong note bangmah hi lel hi. Na nu uh Israel ka susia ding hi

Ka mite in kei hong phawklo uh ahih manin ka susia ding hi. No siampite in kei hong phawknuam loin, ka thuhilhnate nial na hih manun ka siampi dingin kong deih nawn kei a, na tate uh zong siampi-in ka zang kei ding hi
Siampi tam semsem leh kei tungah a khialhna uh tam semsem hi. Amau' minthan'na pen mindaina ka suaksak ding hi
Ka mite' mawhna amaute in hauhlawh uh a, ka mite a mawh semsem ding uh a ut uh hi
Mite' thuak dingin a kilawm gimna mah siampite in zong thuak ding uh a, amau' gamtatna bangin gim pia-in amau' siatna bangin ka thukkik ding hi

Amaute, pasian dangte a bia dingin kei kiang panin kiheikhia uh ahih manin biakpiakna a sa tanhte uh a nek hangun a gil uh vah tuanlo ding hi. Mi pun'na ding deihna-in biakpiakna-in numei tawh mawhna a bawl uh hangin mi pung tuanlo ding hi
Leenggahzu in ka mite' thungaihsut theihna beisak hi
Ka mite in aisanin singthem peuh thudotin nei uh a, amau' thu theihnopte, ciangkang peuh in gen tazen hi. Amaute in kei hong taisan uh a, a paktat numei bangin pasian dangte a zuan uh hi

Amaute in mualsangte dawna biakna munte-ah biakna pia uh a, a nuai liim hoih ahih manin mual neute tungah a po tawsaw kung, poplar kung, leh terebinth kungte nuai-ah paknamtui halin a bia uh hi. Tua thu hangin na tanute uh numei paktat suak uh a, na mote un midang tawh mawhna a bawl uh hi

Na tanute uh a paktat manin gim ka pia kei ding a, na mote uh midang tawh a mawh manin zong gim ka pia tuan kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh note mahmah numei paktatte tawh na mawh uh a, biakinn numeite tawh nulepa mawhna biakna na bawl uh hi. Paunak-ah, “Thuhoih phawktheihna a neilo mite in siatna thuak ding hi,” kici hi
Kei tungah no Israel mite citakloin nong taisan hangun, note bangin Judah mite khial kei ta hen. Gilgal-ah ahi a, Bethaven-ah ahi zongin pai kei un la, tua lai munah Topa' min tawh na kiciam kei un
A kizualsak zolo bawngla bangin Israel mite phengphi uh ahih manin, lonona munah tuunote anvak bangin amaute bangci vak ding ka hi hiam
Israel mite, milim biak uuklua uh a, cihtheih hilo hi
Amaute, zukham honpi hi uh a, nulepa mawhna a bawlbawl uh hi. Minphat ding sangin minsiat ding utzaw uh hi
Huihpi nung in a mutkhiat bangin amaute a phiatkhiamang ding lungsim a nei uh hi. Amau' biak pasian-te in amaute huhlo ding hi.
